title: Onboarding - Welcome to Poly Studio - Fresh install
scenario: User completes fresh install onboarding, reaches "Organized" screen, sees "Welcome to Poly Studio" overlay, and taps "Get Started" to return to onboarding flow.
steps: Install and launch the app for the first time.
Go through the onboarding flow until reaching the 'Organized' screen.
Observe the 'Welcome to Poly Studio' screen that appears.
Tap 'Get Started' on the 'Welcome to Poly Studio' screen.
expected: The 'Welcome to Poly Studio' screen closes and the user is returned to the 'Organized' screen to continue the onboarding process.
